en: It's time for you to unlock the secret that generations of people have known.
ko: 이제 여러 세대가 알고 있던 비밀을 풀 때야.

en: Every single Pharaoh had a favorite food,
and he would eat that food when he had to make important decisions.
ko: 중요한 결정을 내릴 때 그 음식을 먹었지.

en: When Abraham Lincoln freed the slaves and made this country equal,
ko: 에이브러햄 링컨이 노예를 해방하고 이 나라를 평등하게 만들었을 때,

en: And now we live in the integrated society that we bless our country with today.
ko: 그래서 오늘날 우리가 축복받은 통합된 사회에 살고 있지.

en: I'll tell you one thing that the pharmaceutical industry
ko: 제약 업계와 다이어트 업계가 절대 말 안 해줄 것 중 하나가 외계인은 항상 음식을 먹고 있다는 거야.

en: and the diet industry will never tell you is that aliens are always eating food.
They are eating big meals every day on the spaceships
that they're flying through space on to get to us.
ko: 왜 외계인이 맨날 인간을 먹으려 할까?

en: Why do you think those aliens are always trying to eat humans?
Because humans are ice cream to aliens.
A lot of people are going to tell you a lot of things.
ko: 근데 지금 한 가지 말해줄게, 친구. 효과 있어.

en: And let me tell you something right now, friend. It works.
